scope: fresh migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only; legacy internal/connectors/salesloft is read-only (Capabilities.Write: false, no write.go), so there are no write endpoints in or out of scope. The full Salesloft v2 surface (calls, meetings, notes, tasks, action items, custom fields, imports, etc.) is out of scope until a capability-expansion pass.

excluded.reason: OAuth2 refresh-token exchange, consumed internally by the salesloft AuthHook, not a syncable object stream
